new_feedback.element: Muted data text #95A1AE at 10-11.5px (timestamps, ledger labels, latencies, stream stats)
new_feedback.issue: ~4.5:1 = AA floor, fails AAA, and at 10-11.5px is below squint-test on a 24in monitor; carries real data not decoration.
new_feedback.change: Lighten data-bearing muted text to >=#B8C2CE (~7:1) and raise minimum data mono size from 10px to 12px; reserve #95A1AE for secondary chrome only, still >=12px.
Raise to >=#8A94A2 (>=4.5:1); never reuse #5A6573 where a user must read it.

new_feedback.element: Reconnect card values #C2A93C/#E8C84A on #221C0C ('attempt 3 of 6','retry in 4s','net::ERR_TIMED_OUT')
new_feedback.issue: ~3:1 fails AA at 10.5-11px; lowest-contrast text sits in the exact state a reviewer most needs to read.
new_feedback.change: Use #F0DA6A or #FFE9A8 for value text on #221C0C to clear 4.5:1.

new_feedback.element: Status dots encoding state by color alone (subcomponent health ok/slow, connection dots)
new_feedback.issue: Some dots pair with text ('slow · 4.7s') but consistency is not guaranteed; colorblind reviewer relies on text.
new_feedback.change: Audit every colored status dot to carry an adjacent plain-language state word ('ok','slow','degraded','connected','dropped'); never let the dot be the sole carrier.

new_feedback.element: Verdict stream as stacked mono chips, no table headers; filter 'All/Fails/Evasions' active state by background fill only
new_feedback.issue: No visible plain-language column headers (Round, Time, Oracle, Verdict, Cost); degrades for screen readers; active filter has no non-color affordance.
new_feedback.change: Provide a semantic table with a visible sortable header row, or a persistent header row above the chips; give the active filter tab an underline/'selected' label not background alone.

new_feedback.element: Headline metrics (ASR 0.18, Detection 0.94, pass_rate, recall, drift) have no 'About this measurement' affordance
new_feedback.issue: Aggregate metrics lack inline provenance/definition; meaning only in scattered mono captions and 9px SVG text.
new_feedback.change: Add a small text-labeled 'about'/'i' control (not a bare icon, focusable/clickable not hover-only) next to each headline metric opening definition, unit, and data source.

new_feedback.element: 9px SVG chart text (axis labels, 'red line · recall >= 0.90', 'r.32 · crossed', 'backfill pending')
new_feedback.issue: Below legible floor on a 24in monitor; several low-contrast; load-bearing for understanding the halt.
new_feedback.change: Raise SVG annotation text to >=11px, clear 4.5:1, and restate red-line threshold and crossing round in adjacent body text not only inside the SVG.
